name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn Merrionette Park, Illinois — FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. state...
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its substantial scale in the consumer finance sector.

FirstCash's core business model focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property. Customers can use jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and other merchandise as collateral. Beyond pawn loans, FirstCash offers retail sales of merchandise, gold buying services, and layaway plans with 10% down payments. Through its subsidiary AFF, the company also provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions via a network of 15,000+ merchant partner locations.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive geographic footprint and scale—operating the largest chain of pawn stores internationally rather than operating as independent shops. The company's inclusion in major stock indices reflects institutional investment confidence. Their integrated model combines collateral-based lending with retail merchandise sales, allowing customers to either pawn items for cash or purchase previously pawned goods at potentially lower prices.

The honest assessment is that pawn loans, while fast and accessible to credit-constrained consumers, come with significant financial trade-offs. Pawn loans are non-recourse (meaning the lender cannot pursue additional collection), but they require surrendering personal property and typically carry high effective interest rates when annualized. There is no credit reporting benefit, and customers risk permanent loss of sentimental or valuable items if unable to repay within the loan term.
address: 11445 S Kedzie Ave, Merrionette Park, IL 60803

company_info.headquarters: 11445 S Kedzie Ave, Merrionette Park, IL 60803

pros: Immediate cash access without credit checks—no approval delays for borrowers with poor credit or no credit history
Non-recourse loans mean no additional collection action if unable to repay, only loss of collateral
3,300+ physical locations across 29 U.S. states plus international presence provides convenient local access
Transparent collateral-based pricing—loan amount determined by item value, not hidden fees or variable rates
No credit reporting requirements or monthly payment obligations tracked on credit bureaus
Layaway service offers alternative financing with only 10% down payment for retail purchases
Buys gold and precious metals on-the-spot for customers seeking quick cash conversion of existing items
cons: High effective annual interest rates when pawn loan terms are annualized, creating expensive short-term debt
Risk of losing sentimental or irreplaceable personal property if unable to repay loan within the term
Does not build credit history—pawn loans are not reported to credit bureaus, providing zero credit-building benefit
Items not redeemed become retail inventory, meaning customers lose access to personal possessions permanently
Limited to goods with resale value; cannot pawn intangible assets like future income or services
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers needing immediate funds without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Individuals with poor credit, no credit history, or recent delinquencies who cannot qualify for traditional loans
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to use them temporarily as collateral
Consumers seeking short-term bridge financing for unexpected emergencies while retaining the option to retrieve items
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals facing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable items they can temporarily leverage for immediate cash without undergoing credit checks. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term financing options that provide no credit-building benefit and carry substantial risk of permanent loss of personal property—they should only be used when no other alternatives exist and the borrower is confident in their ability to repay within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Retail sales of merchandise including previously pawned items and new goods
Gold, silver, and platinum buying—customers can sell precious metals for immediate cash
Layaway financing plans with 10% down payment option for retail purchases
Item valuation and collateral assessment for pawn loan determination
Store locator service across 3,300+ locations in 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America
Online inventory browsing through their website
Non-recourse lending (collateral forfeiture only, no additional collection)
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Consumer merchandise purchasing—buying items of value for resale inventory
Pawn loan redemption services during open hours
